scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true }); fs.rmSync('.next-dev', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.clean:dev: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('.next-dev', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.clean:prod: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('.next', { recursive: true, force: true });"
scripts.dev:reset: node scripts/kill-stale-next-dev.cjs && pnpm run clean:dev && node scripts/run-next-dev.cjs
